verdict.note: M2 promote-to-production mechanism, live-validated on real AgentCore: a READY harness was promoted via CreateHarnessEndpoint to a named 'prod' endpoint (ARN returned), ListHarnessVersions returned version 1, and the endpoint + harness were cleaned up in the required order (endpoint READY -> delete endpoint -> delete harness; an endpoint in CREATING blocks deletion with ConflictException). Account id scrubbed.
